summary: Completed testing of Bug P0 fix: Planning M.Prev maintenance end date not respected. All backend API tests passed (15/15). Frontend UI verification confirmed the fix is working correctly - days AFTER maintenance end date now show 'Sans données' (gray) instead of EN_MAINTENANCE (yellow).
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix implementation is correct: getLastMaintenanceEndDate() finds the last maintenance end date for each equipment
getStatusBlocksForDay() correctly returns null (gray) for days after the last maintenance end date
API filtering correctly uses overlap logic: date_fin >= query.date_debut AND date_debut <= query.date_fin
Cron job manage_planned_maintenance_status() properly handles automatic status transitions
Equipment status dots next to names correctly reflect current status (EN_MAINTENANCE during active maintenance)
updated_files: /app/tests/test_planning_mprev_bug_fix.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Planning M.Prev bug fix
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing maintenance data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug P0 fix verified: Planning M.Prev calendar now correctly displays maintenance dates. Key verifications: 1) API /api/demandes-arret/planning/equipements returns entries with date_debut and date_fin, 2) Frontend getLastMaintenanceEndDate() finds last maintenance end date, 3) getStatusBlocksForDay() returns null for days after maintenance end, 4) Calendar shows 'Sans données' (gray) for days after maintenance end instead of EN_MAINTENANCE (yellow), 5) Equipment status dots reflect current status correctly, 6) Annual statistics are calculated correctly. Test data: Equipment 'dgdfhjhgf' has maintenance 2026-01-15 to 2026-01-18, Equipment 'fffgdfgdfg' has maintenance 2026-01-17 to 2026-01-26.

get_planning_equipements.details: Returns entries with date_debut and date_fin, correctly filters by date range overlap

status_history_endpoint.details: Returns status history with equipment_id, statut, changed_at

current_status.details: Equipment current status is valid and reflects maintenance state

list_demandes.details: Returns list of demandes with approved ones having date_debut and date_fin

date_range_validation.details: date_fin >= date_debut for all approved demandes

legend_display.details: Legend shows all status colors including 'Sans données' and 'En maintenance'

maintenance_cells.details: Yellow cells with '🔧 Maintenance planifiée' tooltip for maintenance days

sans_donnees_cells.details: Gray cells with 'Sans données (0h - 24h)' tooltip for days after maintenance end

status_dots.details: Color dots next to equipment names reflect current status correctly

statistics_cards.details: 3 statistics cards showing Opérationnel (97%), En Maintenance (3%), Hors Service (0%)

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: When a maintenance request is approved, the calendar shows the start date correctly but the end date is not respected. The EN_MAINTENANCE status (yellow) appears infinite beyond the planned maintenance end date.
fix_applied: New function getLastMaintenanceEndDate() to find the end date of the last maintenance for each equipment
Modified getStatusBlocksForDay() to return null (gray) for days after the last maintenance end date
Improved API filtering to correctly overlap periods
New cron job manage_planned_maintenance_status() to manage automatic status transitions
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - Days after maintenance end date now correctly show 'Sans données' (gray) instead of EN_MAINTENANCE (yellow)
